case_title: THE TRIAD GROUP, INC. VS. STREVUS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15110053) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TRIAD GROUP, INC.
